agreement.invalidOrExpired: This agreement link is invalid or has expired.

checkout.addonsNote: Available add-ons depend on what the host offers for this vehicle.
checkout.cancellationPolicy: Free cancellation up to 48 hours before pickup. 24-48hr: 50% of first day. Under 24hr: 100% of first day. No-show: full trip charged.
checkout.checkEmail: Check your email for trip details and next steps.
checkout.cleaningPolicy: Return vehicle clean. Fees: $30 (light) to $250 (severe). Smoking: $250. Unauthorized pets: $150.
checkout.confirmInsurance: I confirm I carry valid auto insurance and accept full financial responsibility for any damages not covered by my policy.
checkout.confirmInsuranceA11y: I confirm I carry valid auto insurance and accept full financial responsibility
checkout.fuelPolicy: Return at same fuel level. Shortage: $5/gal + $25 refueling fee. EV: $0.30/kWh + $15 fee.
checkout.lateReturnPolicy: 30-min grace period. After: $25/hr. 2+ hours: full extra day. 6+ hours no contact: deposit forfeited.
checkout.mileagePolicy: 200 miles/day included (host may set different limit). Excess: $0.35/mile.
checkout.notCovered: ⚠️ NOT covered by any protection tier:
checkout.ownInsuranceDesc: I decline Trip Protection and confirm I carry personal auto insurance that covers peer-to-peer rentals.
checkout.paymentCancelled: Payment was cancelled. You can try again.
checkout.paymentFailedToLoad: Payment page failed to load. Please try again.
checkout.reimbursementNote: 🛡 Ride reimburses the host's insurance deductible — host must carry valid auto insurance with state minimums
checkout.securityDepositPolicy: $250 hold at booking (up to $500 for select vehicles). Released within 48 hours of clean return.
checkout.selectProtectionError: Please select a Trip Protection tier or confirm you have your own insurance.
checkout.tollsPolicy: If vehicle has a toll pass and you add Toll Pass ($3.50/day): unlimited tolls. Without: tolls charged by plate + $5 admin fee per toll.
checkout.tripProtectionDisclaimer: Trip Protection is NOT insurance. It is a limited program where Ride reimburses the host's insurance deductible only. Your own auto insurance and the host's auto insurance are the primary coverage. Ride does not cover repair costs, liability claims, or property damage directly.

login.title: Guest Sign In

onboarding.howItWorksBody:
1. Browse and book a car
2. Coordinate pickup with your host via Trip Chat
3. Take inspection photos before your trip
4. Drive safe and enjoy!
5. Return the vehicle and complete your review

Your host sets the rules — check the listing for details on mileage, fuel, and pickup instructions.
onboarding.legalBody:
By using Ride Car Sharing, you agree to our Terms of Service:

• Ride is a peer-to-peer marketplace, NOT a rental company
• We do not own, insure, or inspect the vehicles
• Hosts are independent vehicle owners
• Trip Protection is NOT insurance
• You must be 21+ with a valid driver's license
• You are responsible for damages beyond your selected protection tier

Full terms available at ride-carsharing.com/terms
onboarding.protectionBody:
Our Trip Protection Program helps coordinate damage resolution between guests and hosts. IT IS NOT INSURANCE AND DOES NOT REPLACE YOUR AUTO INSURANCE.

What happens if damage occurs during a trip:

• Basic (Free) — Guest is responsible for all costs. Host files with their own insurance.
• Standard ($12/day) — Ride pays the host's insurance deductible (up to $1,000) so the host's insurer covers the repair.
• Premium ($22/day) — Ride pays the host's insurance deductible (up to $2,500) + provides roadside assistance.

🛡 FOR HOSTS — What this means for you:
• When a guest selects Standard or Premium, we reimburse YOUR insurance deductible only
• Your insurance company handles the actual repair claim
• You MUST carry auto insurance that meets your state minimum requirements
• You MUST notify your insurer that you share your vehicle peer-to-peer

⚠️ IF YOU DO NOT HAVE VALID INSURANCE:
• Ride is NOT responsible for any vehicle damage
• You will not receive any deductible reimbursement
• You accept full financial responsibility for your vehicle

This is a limited reimbursement program, not insurance coverage.
onboarding.welcomeBody: Browse locally hosted vehicles, book instantly, and enjoy trip protection on every booking.
